opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected and no online booking capability on site.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing leads in Boise go to competitors who offer instant online booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget so Boise customers self-schedule without calling.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact means zero digital lead tracking.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call is permanently lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and follow up every inbound call.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: 167 reviews at 4.9 stars but no review-request automation or post-job marketing tools detected.
opportunities.observation: Strong reputation exists but is growing slowly without systematic review solicitation after each job.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequences to request Google reviews and prompt repeat bookings in Boise.
